title: States registry
description: The single list of states the app knows about. The state picker renders 'available' states; 'draft' states exist on disk for authoring but are hidden from users and exempt from bank-sufficiency validation. Adding a state to the app means adding its data/states/<code>/ directory and one entry here — app code never changes. The validator enforces registry <-> directory consistency both ways.

version.description: Bump on any change; the service worker uses it for cache busting.

code.description: USPS two-letter state code, lowercase. Must match a data/states/<code>/ directory.

status.description: available: shown in the state picker, full validation. draft: authoring in progress, hidden from users, schema-checked but exempt from bank sufficiency.
